case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. VINCENT MORRIS HEWITT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,828.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT HEWITT, VINCENT MORRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE-SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEWITT, VINCENT MORRIS $1,826.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,866.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
